welcome.heroTitle: Transform your raw data into powerful dashboards
welcome.heroDesc: Upload any dataset, automatically generate star schemas, run quality checks, and explore interactive dashboards — all powered by AI.
welcome.noAccountNeeded: No account required to start. Create one later to save your work.
welcome.howItWorksDesc: From raw data to actionable insights in 6 simple steps
welcome.step1Desc: Drop your CSV, Excel, or JSON files. The platform accepts any schema and automatically detects data types.
welcome.step2Desc: Run data quality analysis before processing. Check completeness, validity, uniqueness, and consistency scores.
welcome.step3Desc: Clean and transform your data with configurable options. Remove duplicates, handle nulls, normalize strings.
welcome.step4Desc: Automatically generates fact and dimension tables with surrogate keys and a time dimension.
welcome.step5Desc: Browse your structured data, run SQL queries, or use natural language to explore with AI assistance.
welcome.step6Desc: Auto-generated dashboards with KPIs, charts, and filters tailored to your specific data.
welcome.ctaDesc: Upload your first dataset and see the magic happen. No setup needed.

about.title: About BI Platform
about.description: A complete Business Intelligence platform that transforms raw data into structured star schemas and interactive dashboards, powered by AI for effortless data analysis.
about.feature1Desc: Automatically detects measures, dimensions, and keys from your raw datasets.
about.feature2Desc: Clean, transform, and load data with built-in quality checks and validation.
about.feature3Desc: Generates fact and dimension tables with surrogate keys and time dimensions.
about.feature4Desc: Visualize KPIs, time series, and aggregations with dynamic filtering.
about.feature5Desc: Completeness, validity, uniqueness, and consistency checks on all your data.
about.feature6Desc: Full English and French support throughout the entire application.
about.step1Desc: Upload CSV, Excel, or JSON files. The system accepts multiple datasets with different schemas.
about.step2Desc: The platform detects column types, identifies keys, and suggests star schema entities.
about.step3Desc: Set your data cleaning preferences and launch the ETL pipeline with quality validation.
about.step4Desc: Fact and dimension tables are automatically created and loaded into the data warehouse.
about.step5Desc: View KPIs, charts, and run queries — including natural language questions with AI.
about.faq1Q: Do I need an account to use the platform?
about.faq1A: No, you can use all features without creating an account. However, to save your projects, dashboards, and ETL configurations, you need to create a free account.
about.faq2A: The platform supports CSV, Excel (.xlsx, .xls), and JSON files. You can also connect to API endpoints for live data ingestion.
about.faq3A: A star schema is a data warehouse design pattern with a central fact table (containing measures like sales, quantities) surrounded by dimension tables (products, customers, dates). It's optimized for analytical queries.
about.faq4Q: How does data quality checking work?
about.faq4A: The platform checks four dimensions: completeness (missing values), validity (correct formats), uniqueness (duplicates), and consistency (cross-column coherence). Each gets a score from 0 to 100%.
about.faq5A: The platform uses a local LLaMA 3 model (8B parameters) via Ollama to enable natural language queries, schema suggestions, and transformation recommendations — all without sending data to external APIs.
about.faq6Q: Can I use my own PostgreSQL database?
about.faq6A: Yes, configure the DATABASE_URL environment variable to point to your PostgreSQL instance. By default, the platform uses SQLite for local development.
about.faq7A: All data processing happens locally. The LLM runs on your machine via Ollama. No data is sent to external services or APIs.
about.faq8Q: How do I deploy this in production?
about.faq8A: Use the included Docker Compose configuration. It sets up the backend, frontend, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Ollama in isolated containers ready for deployment.
about.copyright: Built with FastAPI, React, and AI
